name: What exactly happens during the water damage restoration process?

mainEntity.name: What exactly happens during the water damage restoration process?

acceptedAnswer.text: The process includes water extraction, structural drying, sanitizing, odor removal, and repairing damaged materials. Professionals use moisture meters, industrial fans, and dehumidifiers to ensure complete drying. Cleaning eliminates bacteria and mold spores left behind. Final inspection confirms all moisture is gone and repairs meet standards. Every project starts with a rapid assessment and customized mitigation plan. This step-by-step approach ensures full restoration.
acceptedAnswer.description: The process includes water extraction, industrial drying, sanitizing, odor removal, and repairing damaged materials using moisture meters and dehumidifiers for complete restoration.
